title: Proposal envelope (L5 ingress)
description: The structural unit an agent or human submits to request a note change without writing the note. Sidecar location: .okf/proposals/<proposal-id>.yaml. Ingress validation is purely structural; sensitivity reductions and epistemic promotions are admitted but tagged requires-elevated-authority and never auto-applied. The input hash is computed with updated_at excluded so timestamp-stamper runs never invalidate a pending proposal.

patch.description: Authoring-plane keys only. A patch touching projection- or governance-plane data is structurally invalid.

requires_elevated_authority.description: Set by ingress validation when the patch lowers sensitivity or promotes epistemic state; never self-declared as absent by the proposer.

evidence_set_hash.description: Hash over the evidence set; one of the two components of the materially-equivalent test (GKOS v0.76 §7.10).
